failedAssertions.reason: browser_only runs with empty company scope execute grounded_web but inject legacy fixed-company defaults (Scale AI, Figma, Notion) into search queries, violating unrestricted company scope requirement
ats_only runs with empty company scope execute ATS lanes but target specific company boards (scaleai, figma, notion) rather than unrestricted company-agnostic discovery
browser_plus_ats runs with empty company scope execute both lane families but grounded_web uses legacy fixed-company defaults and ATS boards are pinned to legacy companies
